title: gentiana pulvinarum subsp. pulvinarum
intro: Gentiana pulvinarum subsp. pulvinarum is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Gentiana pulvinarum subsp. pulvinarum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in some pharmaceutical preparations to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
